title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: Verisk Modernizes System to Combat Insurance Fraud in Israel

title: Planitar Inc. and Verisk Join Forces to Revolutionize Insurance Adjusters' Workflow with iGUIDE Instant Sketch
text: WATERLOO, Ontario & JERSEY CITY, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Planitar Inc., the creators of iGUIDE, and Verisk announce a strategic integration aimed at accelerating the insurance industry's claims process.

title: Verisk Enters Egypt Health Insurance Market Through AXA Deal

title: Verisk Analytics Stock: Overvalued But The Outlook Is Bright
text: Verisk Analytics is a market-leading company underpinned by a strong moat. The company's recent shift to only focus on insurance will strengthen its data set, which in turn will help them provide customers with superior products. I believe the company has very little risk considering the high retention rates (+95%) and 81% of revenue comes from subscription/long-term contracts.

title: 2 Tech Stocks Markel Gayner Has Loaded Up On
text: Markel Gayner Asset Management is an investment firm with $8.4 billion in assets under management. The company is run by CEO Tom Gayner (Trades, Portfolio,), who has taken inspiration from Warren Buffett (Trades, Portfolio)'s Berkshire Hathaway ( BRK.A , Financial) ( BRK.B , Financial) and its insurance arm in that it invests its insurance float.

title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (VRSK) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Verisk (VRSK) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenues Estimates
text: Verisk's (VRSK) revenues decline year over year in second-quarter 2023 after the sale of Financial Services and Energy and Specialized Markets.

title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.51 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.40 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.53 per share a year ago.

title: Verisk Reports Second-Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Aug. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics and technology provider, today announced results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023.

title: What to Expect from Verisk Analytics' (VRSK) Q2 Earnings?
text: Verisk Analytics' (VRSK) earnings and revenues in the second quarter of 2023 are likely to have taken a hit from the disposition of Energy and Specialized Markets, and Financial Services segments.
